{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forged blue-white handprint
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] can manifest a [[Forged blue-white handprint]] to strike opponents.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
